title: Magnarelli Center Sound System Grant and Items 14-15 Withdrawn
summary: Clarification that Councilor Caldwell's grant item funds a new sound and music system at Magnarelli Community Center (Machznney Park) for youth and senior programming. Items 14 and 15 (bond ordinance and authorization) withdrawn by Parks Commissioner for further work.
raw_content:

[00:06:21] specifically for Machznney to be used
[00:06:23] for youth sound and music and seniors,
[00:06:26] whatever happens in that building. The
